description: A faithful Codex pet recreation of a gray-and-cream spotted mechanical explorer kitten with brass goggles, a bell collar, a vintage brass backpack, and a gentle map-reading companion spirit.

idle.notes: Quiet standing idle with tiny blink and soft explorer composure.

walk.notes: True directional walk rows used for movement and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Gentle observing loop with a head tilt, lean, and attentive gaze.

happy.notes: Restrained pleased loop with a tiny proud paw lift and brighter expression.

sleep.notes: Curled resting loop with closed eyes and visible goggles, bell, backpack, and ringed tail.

explore.notes: In-place scout loop for careful searching, not literal sprinting.

jump.notes: Small agile jump with tidy takeoff, air moment, and landing.

map.notes: Fixed-atlas spare row intentionally remapped to a map-checking loop with a non-text explorer map.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true left-facing and right-facing walk rows.

explore.notes: Fixed atlas running row was intentionally remapped to an in-place scout loop.

map.notes: Fixed atlas spare row was intentionally remapped to a map-checking loop with no text.

helper.notes: No dedicated helper row remained in the fixed 8x9 atlas after preserving idle, walk, curious, happy, sleep, explore, jump, and map. The explore loop is the nearest companion-support behavior.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, eyes, muzzle, body, backpack, and tail all face left in running-left
head, eyes, muzzle, body, backpack, and tail all face right in running-right
goggles, bell collar, brass backpack, ringed tail, and gray-white spotted coat stay readable at small size
